---
title: "Marketing Funnel Attribution Analysis"
image: "https://placehold.co/600x400?text=Attribution+Model"
categories: [Attribution, Marketing Analytics, Conversion Analysis]
index: 4
---

#### **Overview**  
Developed a marketing attribution and funnel analysis to evaluate channel performance and identify which touchpoints drive conversions across the customer journey.

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
#### **Learning Outcomes**  
- Mapped customer journey across funnel stages  
- Developed attribution logic for marketing channels  
- Analyzed touchpoint contribution to conversions  
- Evaluated multi-channel campaign performance  
- Identified inefficiencies in conversion flow 
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
#### **Key Skills Gained**  
- Identified which channels contribute most to conversions  
- Found that some channels drive traffic but not conversions  
- Highlighted importance of multi-touch attribution  
- Improved budget allocation across marketing channels  
- Strengthened overall campaign optimization strategy  

:::
:::
